import sys

# RUNNER_CODE


refSol = RefSolution()
sol = Solution()

sb = ""

for line in sys.stdin:
    line = line.strip()
    if not line:
        continue

    n = int(line)

    if n < 1 or n > 100:
        sb += f"Invalid TestCase {n} \n"
        print(sb, end="")
        break

    actualOutput = sol.generateArray(n)
    sb += f"actualOutput={actualOutput}\n"

    expectedOutput = refSol.generateArray(n)
    sb += f"expectedOutput={expectedOutput}\n"

print(sb, end="")
submitCode:
import sys

# SUBMIT_CODE

sol = Solution()

lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
sb = ""

i = 0
while i + 1 < len(lines):
    input_line = lines[i].strip()
    output_line = lines[i+1].strip()
    i += 2

    n = int(input_line)

    if n < 1 or n > 100:
        sb += f"Invalid TestCase {n} \n"
        break

    actualOutput = sol.generateArray(n)
    arrStr = str(actualOutput).replace(" ", "")

    if output_line.replace(" ", "") == arrStr:
        sb += "Passed\n"
    else:
        sb += "Failed\n"

print(sb, end="")

referenceSolution:
def ref_diff(a, b):
    return (b - a) if (a - b) < 0 else (a - b)
submitCode:
# RUNNER_CODE

result = ""

while True:
    try:
        s1 = input().strip()
        if s1 == "":
            print(result)
            break

        s2 = input().strip()
        s3 = input().strip()

        a = int(s1)
        b = int(s2)
        expected = int(s3)

        if expected == diff(a, b):
            result += "Passed\n"
        else:
            result += "Failed\n"
            print(result)
            break
    except EOFError:
        break

def ref_isSumDivisibleByK(nums, k):
    return sum(nums) % k == 0
runnerCode:
import sys
import io
import contextlib

# RUNNER_CODE

lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
i = 0
while i < len(lines) - 1:
    arr = list(map(int, lines[i].replace('[', '').replace(']', '').replace(' ', '').split(',')))
    if any(x < 0 or x > 100 for x in arr):
        print(f"Input constraint violation {x} is not in constraints")
        i += 2
        continue

    k = int(lines[i+1].strip())
    if k < 1 or k > 10:
        print(f"Input constraint violation {k} is not in constraints")
        break

    expected_output = ref_isSumDivisibleByK(arr, k)

    f = io.StringIO()
    with contextlib.redirect_stdout(f):
        actual_output = isSumDivisibleByK(arr, k)
    user_prints = f.getvalue().strip()

    print(f"actualOutput={actual_output}\nexpectedOutput={expected_output}\nUserPrints={user_prints}\n")

    i += 2

lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()

# SUBMIT_CODE

i = 0
while i + 2 < len(lines):
    nums = list(map(int, lines[i].strip().split()))
    k = int(lines[i + 1].strip())
    expected_output = int(lines[i + 2].strip())

    actual_output = isSumDivisibleByK(nums, k)

    if actual_output != expected_output:
        print("Failed")
    else:
        print("Passed")

    i += 3
